checkin.journal:
Slept 7h was tired but was hard to stay asleep, boniko hurts on my back
Was in a good mood, felt like a child on a christmas when they told me they will build spin and hold game for us, this is really going to be something special
Inspired by: scatterkings team, just happy they did it
Didnt like: sandi - got some negative energy from there
Idea: first piggy is defined by your first deposit 5x. Also question can you get him back? Maybe when it expires you can get him back quick by making another
